title: [MTR 4.0] smb112x's CAF Urbos 3 Pack
description: CAF Urbos 3 Pack for Minecraft Transit Railway mod.
body:
⚠️**MTR4.0 MOD REQUIRED**⚠️

- Blank
- 🇹🇼 Kaohsiung LRT

**Notice**

There might be orientation bug when you first configured the train at sidings. 
If it occurs, Try changing the siding direction.

Redistribution of this file without permission is not allowed.
